audit_result.proof_trace: Property claims each blob produces exactly CELLS_PER_EXT_BLOB (128) cell-proof pairs. Code calls kzg.ComputeCells() without validating len(cells)==128, then constructs proofs array with exactly 128 elements. If library returns >128 cells, excess cells are silently ignored creating cells/proofs length mismatch.
audit_result.attack_scenario: If c-kzg-4844 library bug or version mismatch causes ComputeCells() to return ≠128 cells, code silently accepts mismatched CellsAndProofs struct, violating the spec invariant and potentially causing data column reconstruction failures.

PROP-57888860-inv-027.text: Each blob must produce exactly CELLS_PER_EXT_BLOB cell-proof pairs in cells_and_kzg_proofs construction.
